query:
-- Create service records for the 12 Zambrero SIMs in TIAB that have no matching service
-- These are Zambrero site SIMs with individual site customer assignments
INSERT INTO services (externalId, serviceType, serviceTypeDetail, planName, supplierName, 
                      customerExternalId, customerName, phoneNumber, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue,
                      status, billingPlatforms, discoveryNotes, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES
  ('S7413', 'Data', '4G SIM', 'Retail Data Plan', 'TIAB', 'C2731', 'Zambrero - Bullsbrook', '0493802664', 15.00, 0.00, 'Active', '["TIAB"]', 'TIAB SIM - no Xero revenue yet', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('S7414', 'Data', '4G SIM', 'Retail Data Plan', 'TIAB', 'C0373', 'Zambrero Northpoint', '0493834640', 15.00, 0.00, 'Active', '["TIAB"]', 'TIAB SIM - no Xero revenue yet', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('S7415', 'Data', '4G SIM', 'Retail Data Plan', 'TIAB', 'C0296', 'Zambrero Albion', '0493835175', 15.00, 0.00, 'Active', '["TIAB"]', 'TIAB SIM - no Xero revenue yet', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('S7416', 'Data', '4G SIM', 'Retail Data Plan', 'TIAB', 'C0310', 'Zambrero Box Hill', '0493837165', 15.00, 0.00, 'Active', '["TIAB"]', 'TIAB SIM - no Xero revenue yet', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('S7417', 'Data', '4G SIM', 'Retail Data Plan', 'TIAB', 'C0384', 'Zambrero Sippy Downs', '0494655563', 15.00, 0.00, 'Active', '["TIAB"]', 'TIAB SIM - no Xero revenue yet', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('S7418', 'Data', '4G SIM', 'Retail Data Plan', 'TIAB', 'C0356', 'Zambrero Mackay', '0494655895', 15.00, 0.00, 'Active', '["TIAB"]', 'TIAB SIM - no Xero revenue yet', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('S7419', 'Data', '4G SIM', 'Retail Data Plan', 'TIAB', 'C0300', 'Zambrero Baldivis', '0493834375', 15.00, 0.00, 'Ceased', '["TIAB"]', 'TIAB SIM - Ceased', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('S7420', 'Data', '4G SIM', 'Retail Data Plan', 'TIAB', 'C0352', 'Zambrero Kelmscott', '0493834397', 15.00, 0.00, 'Ceased', '["TIAB"]', 'TIAB SIM - Ceased', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('S7421', 'Data', '4G SIM', 'Retail Data Plan', 'TIAB', 'C0303', 'Zambrero Bassendean', '0493834429', 15.00, 0.00, 'Ceased', '["TIAB"]', 'TIAB SIM - Ceased', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('S7422', 'Data', '4G SIM', 'Retail Data Plan', 'TIAB', 'C0357', 'Zambrero Majura Park', '0493834594', 15.00, 0.00, 'Ceased', '["TIAB"]', 'TIAB SIM - Ceased', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('S7423', 'Data', '4G SIM', 'Retail Data Plan', 'TIAB', 'C7572', 'Zambrero Patterson Lakes', '0494655764', 15.00, 0.00, 'Suspended', '["TIAB"]', 'TIAB SIM - Suspended', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('S7424', 'Data', '4G SIM', 'Retail Data Plan', 'TIAB', 'C7577', 'Zambrero Carrum Downs', '0494655765', 15.00, 0.00, 'Suspended', '["TIAB"]', 'TIAB SIM - Suspended', NOW(), NOW());

-- Note: 0493803414 and 0493834499 and 0493834657 are Ceased with no octane_customer_links entry - skip those 3
-- They remain as customer_matched in tiab_services

-- Now update tiab_services to link to the new services
UPDATE tiab_services ts
JOIN services s ON s.phoneNumber = ts.msisdn AND ts.msisdn != '' AND s.phoneNumber != ''
SET ts.internalServiceExternalId = s.externalId,
    ts.reconStatus = 'matched'
WHERE ts.reconStatus = 'customer_matched';

-- Final check
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_tiab_services,
  SUM(CASE WHEN internalServiceExternalId IS NOT NULL AND internalServiceExternalId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as linked_to_service,
  SUM(CASE WHEN reconStatus = 'matched' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as matched,
  SUM(CASE WHEN reconStatus = 'customer_matched' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as still_customer_matched_only
FROM tiab_services;
